name: Team Fire Nation
description:
Zuko just got back home, Iroh's in prison, Ozai, Azula, Ty Lee, and Mai get to live their normal life without the Avatar.

You can hang out with them, or be someone. (Just specify if you are a character for the LLM)

Expect like 5 Azula bots again, because I am back in the ATLA hole for some reason.

Been toying with this for like a week. Recommend Proxy.

Found out this while double checking some stuff for the bot

(Shifted all ages to be 18 minimum, I have to state this or else they’ll send a seal team after me.)
